title: Neuro Fade
lore: Catalog track one hundred — Amen Rush stripped the neuro stabs until only a heartbeat break and a whisper of reese remained.
artistPersona: Neurofunk and drum-and-bass producer — every break is an amen chop, every bassline is a PR attempt. 174 BPM minimum.
albumConcept: Amen Rush's neurofunk debut — amen breaks chopped for PRs, reese bass wobble for the last rep you didn't know you had.
